theme: Do You Have Good Dining Etiquette?

sentences.english: In this episode, we're discussing etiquette — the rules about what makes polite behaviour — and in particular the dos and don'ts about what you should and shouldn't do when eating.
sentences.korean: 이번 에피소드에서 에티켓 — 예의 바른 행동의 규칙, 특히 먹을 때 해야 할 것과 하지 말아야 할 것을 논의해요.

sentences.english: If you clink glasses, you're slopping a bit of your drink into his cup and he's slopping a bit of drink into your cup.
sentences.korean: 잔을 부딪치면 음료가 서로의 컵에 조금 넘쳐요.

sentences.english: And therefore, by having that toast you are showing: 'Look I trust you. You trust me.’
sentences.korean: 그래서 건배를 함으로써 '나는 널 믿어, 너도 나를 믿잖아'를 보여주는 거예요.

sentences.english: The answer to my quiz question about the most common complaint about bad restaurant behaviour was people eating noisily.
sentences.korean: 식당에서 가장 흔한 불만에 대한 퀴즈 답은 시끄럽게 먹는 사람이었어요.

quiz.question: What does '건배하다 — 존경이나 축하를 위해 잔을 들고 마시다' mean in English?
